# Dental Home Kanpur

> Dental Home is a dental and maxillofacial clinic in Kakadeo, Kanpur, India, led by Dr. Ankur Rathaur, a Maxillofacial Surgeon. The clinic offers general, cosmetic, and surgical dental care for patients in Kanpur and the surrounding area.

Dental Home provides comprehensive dental treatment under the supervision of Dr. Ankur Rathaur, BDS, MDS (Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery). The clinic is located in Kakadeo, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, and serves patients seeking general dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, and complex maxillofacial/surgical procedures.

Phone: +91-8303879982
Address: Kakadeo, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India
Website: https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com

## Services

- [Dental Implants](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Permanent tooth replacement solutions.
- [Root Canal Treatment](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Pain relief and tooth preservation for infected or damaged teeth.
- [Teeth Scaling & Polishing](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Professional cleaning to remove plaque and tartar.
- [Smile Designing](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Cosmetic smile makeovers.
- [Teeth Whitening](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Professional whitening treatments.
- [Braces & Aligners](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Orthodontic correction for misaligned teeth.
- [Wisdom Tooth Removal](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Surgical extraction of impacted or problematic wisdom teeth.
- [Maxillofacial Surgery](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Advanced surgical care for the face, jaw, and mouth, led by a qualified maxillofacial surgeon.
- [Oral Cancer Screening](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Early detection screening for oral cancer.
- [Full Mouth Rehabilitation](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Comprehensive restoration of function and aesthetics.
- [Dental Crowns & Bridges](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Restorative solutions for damaged or missing teeth.
- [Dentures](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Removable replacements for missing teeth.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Aesthetic dental treatments for smile improvement.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/): Overview of Dental Home, Dr. Ankur Rathaur, and the clinic's approach to dental and maxillofacial care in Kakadeo, Kanpur.
- [Services](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/service.html): Full listing of dental and maxillofacial treatments offered at the clinic.
- [Blog](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/blog.html): Dental care articles and patient education content.
- [Gallery](https://www.dentalclinickanpur.com/gallery.html): Photos of the clinic and treatment outcomes.

## Notes

Dental Home differentiates itself through the presence of a qualified Maxillofacial Surgeon on staff, enabling it to handle surgical cases (wisdom tooth extraction, jaw surgery, oral cancer screening) that general dental clinics typically refer out.
